metadata.description: Give Claude a book input. /read-book extracts EPUB/PDF/HTML/DOCX/MD/TXT, chunks with citations, and hands it to Claude.

plugins.name: read-book
plugins.description: Read a book or document (EPUB, PDF, HTML, Markdown, DOCX, TXT). Extracts clean text with the unstructured library, chunks it with page/section citations, and searches or reads specific parts.
